debug_info.goal:
a b c : ℝ
h₀ : 0 < a ∧ 0 < b ∧ 0 < c
h₁ : c < a + b
h₂ : b < a + c
h₃ : a < b + c
⊢ 0 ≤ a ^ 2 * b * (a - b) + b ^ 2 * c * (b - c) + c ^ 2 * a * (c - a)

failed_attempts:
let f (x y z : ℝ) := x^2 * y * (x - y) + y^2 * z * (y - z) + z^2 * x * (z - x)
  have f_cyc : ∀ x y z, f x y z = f y z x := by intros; simp [f]; ring
  have lemma_desc : ∀ x y z, 0 ≤ z → 0 ≤ y - z → 0 ≤ x - y → f x y z ≥ 0 := by
    intros x y z hz hyz hxy
    let u := x - y; let v := y - z
    have hx : x = z + v + u := by linarith
    have hy : y = z + v := by linarith
    have : f x y z = z^2*(u^2+u*v+v^2) + z*(u^3+4*u^2*v+3*u*v^2+v^3) + u*v*(u+v)^2 := by
      rw [hx, hy]; simp [f]; ring
    rw [this]
    have hu : 0 ≤ u := hxy; have hv : 0 ≤ v := hyz
    positivity
  have lemma_asc : ∀ x y z, 0 < x → 0 ≤ y - x → 0 ≤ z - y → x > z - y → f x y z ≥ 0 := by
    intros x y z hx hyx hzy htri
    let u := y - x; let v := z - y; let d := x - v
    have hd : 0 < d := by linarith
    have hx : x = v + d := by linarith
    have hy : y = v + d + u := by linarith
    have hz : z = v + d + u + v := by linarith
    have : f x y z = d^2*(u^2+u*v+v^2) + d*(u^3+2*u^2*v+3*u*v^2+3*v^3) + (2*u*v^3+2*v^4) := by
      rw [hx, hy, hz]; simp [f]; ring
    rw [this]
    have hu : 0 ≤ u := hyx; have hv : 0 ≤ v := hzy
    positivity
  rcases le_total a b with hab | hba
  · rcases le_total a c with hac | hca
    · rcases le_total b c with hbc | hcb
      · exact lemma_asc a b c h₀.1 (sub_nonneg.2 hab) (sub_nonneg.2 hbc) (by linarith)
      · rw [f_cyc a b c, f_cyc b c a]
        exact lemma_desc b c a (le_of_lt h₀.1) (sub_nonneg.2 hcb) (sub_nonneg.2 hca)
    · rw [f_cyc, f_cyc b c a]
      exact lemma_asc c a b h₀.2.2 (sub_nonneg.2 hca) (sub_nonneg.2 hab) (by linarith)
  · rcases le_total b c with hbc | hcb
    · rcases le_total a c with hac | hca
      · rw [f_cyc]
        exact lemma_asc b a c h₀.2.1 (sub_nonneg.2 hba) (sub_nonneg.2 hac) (by linarith)
      · exact lemma_desc a c b (le_of_lt h₀.2.1) (sub_nonneg.2 hcb) (sub_nonneg.2 hca)
    · exact lemma_desc a b c (le_of_lt h₀.2.2) (sub_nonneg.2 hcb) (sub_nonneg.2 hba)
